questions.question: Scientists of which institution have recently identified Electromagnetic Ion Cyclotron (EMIC) waves?
questions.explanation: The Scientists of Indian Antarctic station, Maitri, have recently identified and studied the characteristics of Electromagnetic Ion Cyclotron (EMIC) waves, which are a form of plasma waves. These waves are said to play an important role in precipitation of killer electrons (electrons having speed close to speed of light, which form the radiation belt of planet Earth), which are hazardous to our space-borne technology and instruments.

questions.question: Which institution has released the Global Food Policy Report, 2023?
questions.explanation: The Global Food Policy Report, 2023 has been released by the International Food Policy Research Institute. According to the report, there is an increased need for investment beyond short-term to build food systems that are more resilient and equitable. The International Food Policy Research Institute (IFPRI) was established in 1975 and is headquartered at Washington, DC. The institute provides research-based policy solutions to sustainably reduce poverty and end hunger.

questions.question: As per a recent research, individuals infected with which disease are significantly more likely to be diagnosed with Type 2 diabetes?
questions.explanation: Type 2 diabetes is a chronic health condition that impacts the way the body processes blood sugar (glucose). According to a new research, individuals infected with COVID-19 were significantly more likely to be diagnosed with Type 2 diabetes within a year of their infection, compared to those who have not been exposed to the viral pathogen.

questions.question: Which Union Ministry has launched the ‘SATHI Portal and Mobile App’?

options.label: A
options.text: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

options.label: C
options.text: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

answer.label: A
answer.text: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

questions.explanation: Union Agriculture and Farmers Welfare Minister Narendra Singh Tomar launched the SATHI (Seed Traceability, Authentication and Holistic Inventory) Portal and Mobile App. It is a Centralized Online System for seed traceability, authentication and inventory designed to deal with the challenges of seed production, quality seed identification and seed certification. It has been developed by the NIC in collaboration with the Union Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare.

questions.question: Which Asian country is set to launch the ‘Digital Highway Network’?
questions.explanation: The National Highways Logistics Management (NHLML), a fully-owned special purpose vehicle of the Indian Government, is set to develop a digital highway network by setting up integrated utility corridors along national highways. As part of this initiative, the Ministry of Road Transport and Highways has designed 1,367 km of the Delhi-Mumbai Expressway and 512 km of the Hyderabad-Bangalore Corridor as pilot routes for digital highway development.

questions.question: What is the theme of ‘World Earth Day 2023’?
questions.explanation: World Earth Day is observed every year on 22 April to mark the anniversary of the birth of the modern environmental movement in 1970. The theme for this year is the continuation of the 2022 theme “Invest in Our Planet”. The day aims to raise awareness about environmental issues and promote conservation efforts to protect our planet.

questions.question: Which institution released ‘A Breakthrough For People and Planet’ report?
questions.explanation: The report titled “A Breakthrough For People and Planet: Effective And Inclusive Global Governance for Today And The Future” was released recently by the UN’s High-Level Advisory Board (HLAB) on Effective Multilateralism. The report provides an ambitious strategy to overhaul the global governance system.

questions.question: What is the outlay of the ‘Promotion of Research and Innovation in Pharma MedTech Sector’ scheme?
questions.explanation: Promotion of Research and Innovation in Pharma MedTech Sector is a government scheme that will be launched to strengthen Research and Development in the Indian pharmaceuticals and medical technology sectors. It will be implemented over five years with an outlay of Rs.5,000 crore.

questions.question: India is set to establish a ‘Chamber of Commerce’ with which country?
questions.explanation: An India-Ukraine Chamber of Commerce will be set up to strengthen business ties between the two countries. With the support of the Ukrainian government, the Chamber will aim to boost possibilities for investment and collaboration in sectors like infrastructure and power.

questions.question: Mana, which has been re-termed as the first Indian village, is located in which state/UT?
questions.explanation: Mana, a village situated at the Indo-China border in Uttarakhand, will be now known as the first Indian village. Earlier, it was known as the last Indian village. Mana, located in Uttarakhand’s Chamoli district shares a border with China. The Border Roads Organisation (BRO) placed a signboard at the border village of “Mana” in Uttarakhand, declaring it to be the “First Indian Village.”
